---
title: "Research"
title-block-banner: "#EE6A24"
---

My research focuses on social cognition and the cognitive processes that support it, including gaze detection, face processing, and spatial navigation. I use behavioral experiments, virtual reality, eye tracking, and computational modeling to understand how these abilities vary across individuals, with a particular focus on people on the autism spectrum.

## Journal articles

:::: {.pub-entry}
**DeStefani, S.,** Blain, S., Kraft, J., Locarno, L., Mathis, K., Lasagna, C., Colombi, C., Burton, C., Turner, J., Thakkar, K., Tso, I. (2026) "The dynamics of social gaze: visual attention and autonomic arousal among individuals with varying levels of autistic traits," *Research in Autism*. (in press)
[Link](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.reia.2026.202821){.btn .btn-pub .btn-sm target="_blank"} [PDF](files/papers/DeStefani_etal_2026_ResearchInAutism.pdf){.btn .btn-pub-outline .btn-sm target="_blank"}
::::

:::: {.pub-entry}
Sohn, S., **DeStefani, S.,** Schwartz, M., Roberts, F., Stromswold, K., Kapadia, M., Feldman, J. (2025). "On the Separability of Human Navigational Behaviors in Virtual Reality," *Proceedings for the 47th Annual Meeting of the Cognitive Science Society*.

[Link](https://escholarship.org/uc/item/4pm6p2wv){.btn .btn-pub .btn-sm target="_blank"} [PDF](files/papers/Sohn_etal_2025_CogSci.pdf){.btn .btn-pub-outline .btn-sm target="_blank"}
::::

:::: {.pub-entry}
**DeStefani, S.,** Stromswold, K., & Feldman, J. (2020). "Integration of visual and spoken cues in a virtual reality navigation task," *Proceedings for the 42nd Annual Meeting of the Cognitive Science Society*.

[Link](https://escholarship.org/uc/item/87f0z0v8){.btn .btn-pub .btn-sm target="_blank"} [PDF](files/papers/DeStefani_etal_2020_CogSci.pdf){.btn .btn-pub-outline .btn-sm target="_blank"}
::::

:::: {.pub-entry}
Sohn, S., **DeStefani, S.,** Kapadia, M. (2018). "Dynamic Cognitive Maps for Agent Landmark Navigation in Unseen Environments," *MIG 2018 Proceedings*.
[Link](https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3274247.3274518){.btn .btn-pub .btn-sm target="_blank"} [PDF](files/papers/Sohn_etal_2018_MIG.pdf){.btn .btn-pub-outline .btn-sm target="_blank"}
::::

## Under review

\* *student co-author*

:::: {.pub-entry}
Kemp, K., Blain, S. D., Zehra, S., **DeStefani, S.,** Locarno, L., Mathis, K., Lasagna, C., & Tso, I. F. (2025). "Sex Differences in Social Cognition: Insights from a Sample Enriched for Social Dysfunction." (in revision)

[Link](){.btn .btn-pub .btn-sm} [PDF](){.btn .btn-pub-outline .btn-sm}
::::

:::: {.pub-entry}
\*Kvetnoy, A., Suchojad, J., **DeStefani, S.,** Stromswold, K., Feldman, J. (2025). "The role of eye gaze in social wayfinding." (in revision)

[Link](){.btn .btn-pub .btn-sm} [PDF](){.btn .btn-pub-outline .btn-sm}
::::

:::: {.pub-entry}
**DeStefani, S.,** Sohn, S., Schwartz, M., \*Sharma, Y., Roberts, F., Stromswold, K., Kapadia, M., Feldman, J. (2025). "Behavioral effects of anti-pandemic preventive measures: a VR study."

[Link](){.btn .btn-pub .btn-sm} [PDF](){.btn .btn-pub-outline .btn-sm}
::::

:::: {.pub-entry}
**DeStefani, S.,** Blain, S., Locarno, L., Mathis, K., Lasagna, C., Colombi, C., Burton, C., Turner, J., Thakkar, K., Tso, I. (2026). "Visual Exploration Efficiency Moderates the Association Between Autistic Traits and Social Cognition."

[Link](){.btn .btn-pub .btn-sm} [PDF](){.btn .btn-pub-outline .btn-sm}
::::

:::: {.pub-entry}
Mathis, K., Blain, S. D., Locarno, L., Lasagna, C., **DeStefani, S.,** Kraft, J., Colombi, C., Thakkar, K., Burton, C., & Tso, I. F. (2026). "The link between basic visual processing and higher-level social cognition: Eye gaze perception as a mechanistic bridge in a transdiagnostic sample enriched with social dysfunction."

[Link](){.btn .btn-pub .btn-sm} [PDF](){.btn .btn-pub-outline .btn-sm}
::::
